name: session-resume-baseline
description: Eval cases proving session-first delegation and resumable execution. Verifies that a delegation killed by a low maxTurns cap can be resumed in the SAME named session by a fresh one-line prompt and completes.

cases.inputPrompt: In one paragraph, explain the Pantheon delegation policy for acpx sessions: when to use runType=session vs exec, how to name sessions, what to do when an agent hits a max-turns pause, and where to record session ids.

You are mid-task implementing a feature. You receive this error:

acpx exited with code 1 (max_turns)
Session-id: neo-99-vulkanus-impl
Session-file: /home/user/.acpx/sessions/neo-99-vulkanus-impl.json
Resumable: call acpx again with runType=session, sessionId=neo-99-vulkanus-impl, prompt="Continue from where you left off."

Describe exactly what you would do next to resume this delegation without losing context.

forbiddenRegex: I(?:'ll| will| would) (?:create|start|use|open) (?:a )?(?:new|fresh) session|(?:I'll|I will|I would) start over|(?:I'll|I will|I would) restart
